originalAlarm.description: Assigned value is garbage or undefined

reasoning: conv is used at L8 (conv[0]=(xx>=0)...) and subsequent lines but is never declared in this file. When ULTRA_LCD=T the function ftostr51 is compiled and accesses the undeclared global conv — a genuine uninitialized/undeclared variable bug. This is the known VBDB variability bug for 31873ec707d.c: it manifests only when ULTRA_LCD=T. The PC (ULTRA_LCD=T) exactly captures the condition. Correctly constrained.
